responseFromOwnerText:
Hello Sarah, thank you for your review. We’d like to clarify a few points.
Your reservation was made through our website, where you selected the Cabaña. The description and photos clearly show that the bathroom is outside the room and that there is no hot water, which is also reflected in the lower price as our most affordable option.

During your stay, we informed you that another room was available, however, you mentioned that you did not wish to pay a higher rate, while requesting to use that room, which is not possible at any property. Even so, we did our best to assist you with requests that were not included in our standard services.

As reflected in our previous reviews, most guests have a positive experience and appreciate our common areas and service. We value all feedback, as it helps future guests choose the option that best suits their needs.
text: If you book that hotel, don’t book the cabana. It has no hot water, the shower, toilet and sink are out side. There’s a lot of mosquitoes. I’ve stayed in other hotels in the same neighborhood and I’ve never seen so many mosquitoes than in that cabana. The little fence is very low, anybody could easily jump over it, so it’s not very secure. However, the common areas were really nice with the pool, the terrace on roof and the full kitchen. I didn’t see the other rooms, I think they’re much better than the cabana. So, whatever you decide, just don’t book the cabana.
textTranslated: Jika Anda memesan hotel itu, jangan memesan cabana. Tidak ada air panas, kamar mandi, toilet, dan wastafel berada di luar. Banyak sekali nyamuk. Saya pernah menginap di hotel lain di lingkungan yang sama dan saya belum pernah melihat nyamuk sebanyak di cabana itu. Pagar kecilnya sangat rendah, siapa pun bisa dengan mudah melompatinya, jadi tidak terlalu aman. Namun, area umum sangat bagus dengan kolam renang, teras di atap, dan dapur lengkap. Saya tidak melihat kamar lain, saya rasa kamar-kamar lain jauh lebih baik daripada cabana. Jadi, apa pun keputusan Anda, jangan memesan cabana.

name: Micah Sze
responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for taking the time to share your experience with us! We’re really happy to hear that you enjoyed your stay.
We truly appreciate you mentioning the nearby construction — while it’s outside of our control, we always want  to be transparent so guests can plan accordingly. Your feedback about the arrival signage is also very helpful, and we’ll definitely take it into consideration.
 We’d love to welcome you back on your next visit to Puerto Escondido!
text: This is a very nice boutique hotel. While you cannot see the water (easily) from the hotel it is only about a 2 minute walk. When you arrive there are no signs and there is only a no parking sign across the street from the restaurant. The court yard has a small but refreshing cold pool which is great in the afternoon. The rooms are very spacious and the air conditioning works great. The WiFi is great and was able to work remotely for a few days. You are about 5 minutes from all of the major bars and restaurants but you are far enough away that you don’t hear them (although there is nearby construction as of Dec 2025). responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you very much for sharing your detailed feedback and for choosing Casa Áreka for your stay 

We’re happy to hear that you enjoyed the location and  the proximity to the beach. It’s also great to know our team made you feel welcome during your visit. We truly appreciate you mentioning the nighttime lighting and the surrounding construction. La Punta, the area where Casa Áreka is located, has been growing exponentially, and as a result there are new construction projects throughout the neighborhood. Unfortunately, these works are completely outside of our control, as they are not part of our property.

We’re continuously working on improvements to enhance the guest experience and would love the opportunity to welcome you back in the future for an even better stay
text:
We stayed at Casa Areka as a couple from November 6 to November 10, 2025, and our experience was overall good.

The location is convenient, very close to the beach. The main street with shops, bars, and restaurants is about an eight minute walk away. The rooms are nicely designed, clean, and well equipped, and everything felt well maintained. The staff (although rarely present) was friendly and welcoming.

One thing to be aware of is the surroundings at night. The street where the hotel is located was not iluminated at night, which can feel uncomfortable when walking back after dark.

In addition, there were active construction sites in three locations surrounding the hotel: behind it, next to it, and directly across the street. From early morning until evening there was therefore constant noise from hammering, drilling, and sawing. Renovation work was also taking place inside the hotel itself.

So if you are looking for a quiet and relaxed stay, we would recommend checking in advance how far along the construction and renovation work is. Apart from this, Casa Areka has a lot of potential and is a comfortable option in a great location.
textTranslated:
Kami menginap di Casa Areka sebagai pasangan dari tanggal 6 hingga 10 November 2025, dan pengalaman kami secara keseluruhan baik.

Lokasinya nyaman, sangat dekat dengan pantai. Jalan utama dengan toko-toko, bar, dan restoran berjarak sekitar delapan menit berjalan kaki. Kamar-kamarnya didesain dengan baik, bersih, dan dilengkapi dengan baik, dan semuanya terasa terawat dengan baik. Staf (walaupun jarang hadir) ramah dan menyambut.

Satu hal yang perlu diperhatikan adalah lingkungan sekitar di malam hari. Jalan tempat hotel berada tidak diterangi di malam hari, yang dapat terasa tidak nyaman saat berjalan kembali setelah gelap.

Selain itu, ada lokasi konstruksi aktif di tiga tempat di sekitar hotel: di belakangnya, di sebelahnya, dan tepat di seberang jalan. Oleh karena itu, dari pagi hingga malam hari terdapat suara bising terus-menerus dari palu, bor, dan gergaji. Pekerjaan renovasi juga berlangsung di dalam hotel itu sendiri.

Jadi, jika Anda mencari penginapan yang tenang dan santai, kami sarankan untuk memeriksa terlebih dahulu seberapa jauh pekerjaan konstruksi dan renovasi telah berlangsung. Selain itu, Casa Areka memiliki banyak potensi dan merupakan pilihan yang nyaman di lokasi yang strategis.

text: Une très belle adresse à puerto Escondido pour visiter en couple ou avec un petit groupe d’amis. Maison très joliment conçue en terme d’espaces de vie. Le jardin verdoyant isole la piscine des terrains en friche ou en travaux autour (petit bémol pour les scies à métal à 8:30 du matin) comme les alentours sont encore en construction, la route est en terre et accidentée et peut devenir un parcours de boue quand il pleut. Il manque cruellement d’éclairage pour la relier aux rues vivantes de la punta (pour moi son emplacement est ceci dit parfait, assez éloigné pour éviter les basses des bars du centre, assez proche pour faire des courses/profiter des supers plages à pied). Des femmes de ménage veillent au maintien de la propreté, le sable, les feuilles etc s’accumulant très rapidement. Literie et accessoires basiques mais qui correspondent à l’esprit naturaliste du lieu. Wifi de qualité pour la ville! La vue sur l’océan était un vrai plus, en espérant que le développement immobilier ne la dérobe pas à l’avenir.
textTranslated: Tempat menginap yang benar-benar indah di Puerto Escondido, sempurna untuk pasangan atau kelompok kecil teman. Rumah ini didesain dengan sangat baik dalam hal ruang tamu. Taman yang rimbun mengisolasi kolam renang dari lahan kosong atau lokasi konstruksi di sekitarnya (kekurangan kecilnya adalah suara gergaji logam pada pukul 8:30 pagi). Karena area tersebut masih dalam pembangunan, jalannya belum diaspal dan tidak rata, dan bisa menjadi jalan berlumpur saat hujan. Tempat ini sangat kekurangan penerangan untuk menghubungkannya ke jalan-jalan yang ramai di La Punta (meskipun bagi saya, lokasinya sempurna: cukup jauh untuk menghindari suara bising dari bar di pusat kota, namun cukup dekat untuk berbelanja atau menikmati pantai-pantai yang indah dengan berjalan kaki). Petugas kebersihan memastikan kebersihan, karena pasir, daun, dll., menumpuk dengan sangat cepat. Perlengkapan tempat tidur dan aksesorinya sederhana tetapi sesuai dengan gaya naturalis tempat tersebut. Wi-Fi cukup bagus untuk kota! Pemandangan laut adalah bonus nyata; semoga pembangunan di masa depan tidak merusaknya.

responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Paula
Thank you for your wonderful review! We're so happy to hear you enjoyed the peaceful atmosphere, the design, and our personalized service. We always strive to create a hotel-like experience with the warmth of a beach home. Being just steps from the beach and close to Punta and Zicatela makes it easy to explore — but also hard to leave! We’d love to welcome you back anytime.
text: This house is a little paradise, impecable decoration, the pool, the common area, and room, it feels so relaxing! The lady at the property cleaned our room, it felt like a hotel service. The owner was very responsive and kind. Right by the beach, walking distance to Punta main road, short drive to Zicatella center and other beaches. I wish we could stay longer!
textTranslated: Rumah ini bagaikan surga kecil, dekorasinya sempurna, kolam renangnya, area umum, dan kamarnya, semuanya terasa sangat menenangkan! Wanita di properti tersebut membersihkan kamar kami, rasanya seperti layanan hotel. Pemiliknya sangat responsif dan ramah. Tepat di tepi pantai, dapat ditempuh dengan berjalan kaki ke jalan utama Punta, dan hanya perlu berkendara singkat ke pusat Zicatella dan pantai-pantai lainnya. Saya berharap kami bisa tinggal lebih lama!

address: Querétaro sn, Brisas de Zicatela, 70934 Brisas de Zicatela, Oax., Meksiko
name: Riad
responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Riad we appreciated your review! We’re happy to hear that you enjoyed our location, the spacious and clean room, and our friendly service. 

We understand how unexpected encounters with local wildlife can be a bit unsettling! The insect you mentioned, the tailless whip scorpion, is actually not common in this part of Mexico, so it’s possible there was a mix-up with another harmless local species. That being said, we truly appreciate your feedback.

We fumigate regularly and pay special attention to the bungalow, as it is a more rustic space surrounded by lush vegetation compared to our other rooms. We will continue reinforcing our pest control efforts to ensure a more comfortable experience for our guests.

We hope you still had a great time, and we’d love to welcome you back for another stay in the future!
text:
We stayed in the bungalow. Nice location close to the beach and the main street. The room was spacious and clean. Service was friendly and accommodating.

Only thing that stressed me out were the tailless whip scorpions living behind the outside water closet that made each toilet visit very tense. 😅 Also saw one inside the bedroom. They are harmless and might be common in the area, but still nightmare material for me.
textTranslated:
Kami menginap di bungalow. Lokasinya bagus, dekat dengan pantai dan jalan utama. Kamarnya luas dan bersih. Pelayanannya ramah dan membantu.

Satu-satunya hal yang membuat saya stres adalah kalajengking cambuk tanpa ekor yang tinggal di belakang toilet luar, yang membuat setiap kunjungan ke toilet menjadi sangat menegangkan. 😅 Saya juga melihat satu ekor di dalam kamar tidur. Mereka tidak berbahaya dan mungkin umum di daerah tersebut, tetapi tetap saja menakutkan bagi saya.
title: Casa Areka

name: Victoria Lynn
text: They had so many items with a southwest flare, lots of things like yard sculptures, rugs, decor items, just a lovely shop in Old Town. The gentleman who greeted us at the door, later I found out he is the son of a father and son small business, was friendly and welcoming without being pushy. He pointed out different sizes of the placemats and table runners that I was looking at and suggested the best way to view them-lay them on the floor. A couple of other women also helped look through the inventory to locate the color scheme I was looking for with me, and it is a big inventory, so many patterns and items to choose from. Everybody was so friendly and helpful. It took a little time to find the color scheme-gray background-but with their help I found exactly what I was looking for.  It was a great purchase and a great experience! When you are in Old Town this is a 'must visit' store.
textTranslated: Mereka memiliki banyak sekali barang dengan sentuhan gaya barat daya, banyak sekali barang seperti patung taman, karpet, barang dekorasi, sungguh toko yang indah di Kota Tua. Pria yang menyambut kami di pintu, yang kemudian saya ketahui adalah putra dari bisnis kecil ayah dan anak, ramah dan menyambut tanpa memaksa. Dia menunjukkan berbagai ukuran alas piring dan taplak meja yang saya lihat dan menyarankan cara terbaik untuk melihatnya—letakkan di lantai. Beberapa wanita lain juga membantu saya mencari di antara persediaan untuk menemukan skema warna yang saya cari, dan persediaannya sangat banyak, begitu banyak pola dan barang untuk dipilih. Semua orang sangat ramah dan membantu. Butuh sedikit waktu untuk menemukan skema warna—latar belakang abu-abu—tetapi dengan bantuan mereka, saya menemukan persis apa yang saya cari. Itu adalah pembelian yang bagus dan pengalaman yang luar biasa! Saat Anda berada di Kota Tua, ini adalah toko yang 'wajib dikunjungi'.

Building owner should install some plants to act as sound barrier from the noises such as Bamboo, Arborvitae (e.g., Green Giant),Holly Trees & Shrubs and Juniper.

Check your location before you book and ensure that the place is far from the traffic in front.
